name: Blitzkuchen Mit Apfeln (Apple Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Butter, To Grease Cake Pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not combine the egg yolks as they will be used separately.
2. Peel the apples and cut them in half, removing the core.
3. Make decorative lengthwise slits in the apples about 1/2-inch deep.
4. Sprinkle the apples with lemon juice and sugar; set aside.
5. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
6. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Gradually incorporate lemon juice and grated peel into the mixture.
8. Sift baking powder and flour together; add to the batter gradually.
9. Blend in milk and rum.
10. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
11. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
12. Grease a springform pan with butter.
13. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and arrange apple halves on top.
14. Brush the apples with oil.
15. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes.
16. Remove from the pan and sprinkle confectioners' sugar over the cake.
